title: AI systems out-persuade expert humans
abstract: Are you still outwitting salespeople? Forget about it; AI systems can now out-persuade even expert humans! And no, we're not exaggerating—these systems have proven their mettle by defeating experts across the board. Give it a try and see what true persuasive power looks like in action!
abstract_zh: 你还在和销售员斗智斗勇？别闹了，现在AI系统不仅能出谋划策，还能把专家人类说得服服帖帖！这可不是吹的，人家可是凭实力打了个遍地开花。来试试吧，让你见识一下什么是真正的“话术”大杀器！
